==Biography==

== Trivia ==
* Doesn't like being interviewed. 
* Enjoys playing {{ci|Morgana}}; states that he can't play {{ci|Zed}}.
* Known for using [[Teleport]] during [[EU LCS 2013 Summer]]. Later that season, other mid laners followed suit.
* MVP at [[ESL_Pro_Series_Poland/Season_VI|EPS Poland Season VI]].
* Hates playing against {{ci|Jarvan IV}} and {{ci|Elise}}.
